plugins.name: knowledge-transfer
plugins.description: AI-powered project handover for Claude Code and Codex: export a short non-technical onboarding doc plus the AI's privacy-filtered project memories into the repo; the next developer imports them, verified against the current code. Onboarding that survives people leaving.
